text:
- [escalation] Andy: Family member Andrew Lang shares news about an big upcoming family change.
- [reply needed] Kaylee Hagen: Kaylee Hagen from Edmonds School District extended a deadline for reasonable assurance document to July 10th.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch shared a book review of Disclosure Day and suggests discussing it Thursday evening.
- [no action] Groq: GroqCloud service notice about decommissioning a model version.
- [no action] lang.mc+cc@gmail.com: Automated daily brief email with reminders including a school district document.
- [no action] "Superhuman – Zain Kahn": Superhuman newsletter about Anthropic releasing Sonnet 5 and ChatGPT features.
- [no action] "info@schooljobs.com": Automated job interest card notification from Seattle Public Schools.
- [no action] Google: Automated Google account recovery confirmation notification.
- [no action] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch forwarded an interview about Wall Street, Nazis, and the deep state.
- [no action] Google: Automated Google Terms of Service update notification effective July 30, 2026.
- [no action] Tavily: Stripe failed payment notification for Tavily service charge.
- [no action] Tavily: Tavily pay-as-you-go payment failure notice due to card or funding issue.
